uri.description: Object containing a URI to external data

smallBlob.description: Object containing a blob to external data

largeBlob.description: Object containing a blob to external data

weightedActivity.description: A weighted activity entry, e.g. to add activities to a collection or project.

activity.description: A strong reference to a hypercert activity record. This activity must conform to the lexicon org.hypercerts.claim.activity.

weight.description: The relative weight/importance of this hypercert activity (stored as a string to avoid float precision issues). Weights can be any positive numeric values and do not need to sum to a specific total; normalization can be performed by the consuming application as needed.

weightedContributor.description: A weighted contributor entry, e.g. for attribution on an activity.

contributor.description: The DID, name or pseudonym of the contributor.

weight.description: Relative contribution weight as a decimal string. If omitted, treat as 1.
